## Summary

Add an analytics dashboard showing key project metrics: feature velocity, open issue trend, sprint burndown, and team throughput.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [x] Feature velocity chart (features completed per sprint)
- [ ] Issue trend chart (open vs closed over time)
- [ ] Sprint burndown chart
- [ ] Team throughput breakdown by assignee
- [ ] Date range picker for all charts
